transit.header: Babylon Branch service is suspended between Jamaica and Babylon in both directions due to a PSE&G power outage near Rockville Centre.
transit.description:
Westbound:
The 6:28am train from Babylon to Penn Station is being delayed prior to departure. 
The 6:15am train from Wantagh to Penn Station is being delayed at Wantagh. 
The 6:15am train from Babylon to Grand Central is being delayed at Massapequa
.
The 6:03am train from Babylon to Penn Station is being delayed at Seaford. 
The 5:56am train from Wantagh to Grand Central is being delayed at Baldwin
.
The 5:45am train from Babylon to Grand Central is being delayed at Merrick.
Eastbound:
The 5:40am train from Penn Station to Babylon is being delayed at Rockville Centre.
